channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: The next Fed chair has crypto exposure in portfolio. Here are the details
item.description: Kevin Warsh's financial disclosure reveals stakes in DeFi protocols, Ethereum scaling networks, a Bitcoin Lightning startup, and prediction markets — all of which he's promised to sell.

item.title: Rakuten to allow XRP to be used as payment method by its 44 million customers
item.description: Rakuten Pay users will also be able to spot trade XRP via the Rakuten Pay app and exchange the Japanese e-commerce giant’s points to purchase Ripple’s token

item.title: Crypto.com gets into prediction markets through High Roller tie-up
item.description: The crypto exchange's move could signal a challenge to platforms like Kalshi through the integration of prediction markets, expected to be a $1 trillion market by 2030.

item.title: Google's Gemma Already Acts Like Gemini—Someone Made It Think Like Claude Opus Too
item.description: Jackrong, the developer behind Qwopus, has released Gemopus—a family of Claude Opus-style fine-tunes built on Google's open-source Gemma 4, putting all-American AI in your pocket and on your potato PC.

item.title: Popular DeFi platform warns users to stay away from its site after security breach
item.description: The team that helps operate the platform, CoW Swap, said that it was working to resolve the issue for the DEX aggregator.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation unveils $1M audit subsidy program to boost crypto security and cut costs for builders
item.description: The new initiative aims to address a persistent challenge in crypto development—the high cost of smart contract security audits.

item.title: Ether replays 2025 fractal that sparked 250% ETH price rally
item.description: Ether bounced off multi-year support, while a bullish MACD crossover could signal that ETH is on the path to new highs.

item.title: Fed Chair Nominee Kevin Warsh Discloses Vast Wealth, Investments in Polymarket and SpaceX
item.description: Former Wall Street banker Kevin Warsh, worth well over $100 million, also invested in numerous tech startups—including a “reversible male contraceptive solution."

item.title: Prediction Market Volumes Will Hit $1 Trillion by 2030 as Sports Betting Moderates: Bernstein
item.description: Bernstein's analyst argued that prediction markets will be driven less by big league bets as institutions become more involved.

item.title: Visa deepens blockchain push with Tempo validator node launch
item.description: The payments giant is operating a validator node on the Tempo blockchain, taking a direct role in transaction validation as it expands infrastructure for stablecoin settlement.

item.title: Crypto-aligned super PAC begins to endorse candidates for US midterms
item.description: The Fellowship PAC reported spending more than $1.1 million on advertising for two Republicans running in Georgia and Kentucky in 2026.

item.title: Stablecoin Giant Tether Launches Wallet for USDT, Bitcoin and Gold-Backed Tokens
item.description: Tether’s self-custodial wallet aims to simplify crypto transactions with email-like identifiers, supporting stablecoins and Bitcoin alike.

item.title: XRP consolidation may transform into explosive rally if $1.40 is topped: Data
item.description: XRP transaction activity on Binance mirrors a 2025 signal that preceded the altcoin’s run to an all-time high. Could it happen again?

item.title: Goldman Sachs Files to Launch Bitcoin Income ETF Tied to Options
item.description: Goldman Sachs filed an application for an ETF that seeks to generate income for investors by selling options tied to Bitcoin’s price.

item.title: Figure and Hastra widen DeFi credit offering with auto loan launch
item.description: Figure Technology is adding auto loans to Democratized Prime and extending Hastra beyond Solana, widening tokenized consumer credit access for DeFi investors.

item.title: What Is Hermes? The Self-Improving AI Agent Coming for OpenClaw
item.description: Nous Research's open-source AI agent is the first with a built-in learning loop—it creates skills from experience, gets better the more you use it, and runs on terminal.

item.title: Federal Reserve chair nominee's disclosure includes crypto and AI holdings
item.description: Kevin Warsh did not include the value of several crypto and AI investments among his disclosures as he awaits his confirmation hearing before the Senate Banking Committee.

item.title: Fake Ledger App Steals Millions in Bitcoin, Crypto From Holders—Including Musician G. Love
item.description: A fake Ledger Live app on the Mac App Store duped more than 50 users, swiping more than $9 million in a new crypto scam.

item.title: Goldman Sachs files for bitcoin income ETF in crypto push
item.description: The bank is moving deeper into crypto with a bitcoin ETF that generates income by selling options on bitcoin-linked funds, following BlackRock’s push into similar yield-focused products.

item.title: 1/ The Ethereum Audit Subsidy A joint initiative with audit providers to subsidize the cost of audits for Ethereum builders. Security audits are a best practice, yet expensive. The subsidy program makes audits accessible and strengthens the Ethereum ecosystem - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5YQUpZSmt4QUgyY09jU0x4cUhnTTh2bkxjLW5SRnBCYW0tTGFDNks2MGVBcl9Ibk51VDU4blNHNHp6WmdmeHk0SW16T1c5YXQtRmk0OVlnaHl2dWFkYmZ0M0lpbw?oc=5" target="_blank">1/ The Ethereum Audit Subsidy A …

item.title: JUST IN: Goldman Sachs officially files for a Bitcoin Premium Income ETF! 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9CeklzR3JqU2YxSFp1MkFramdlNG0xTTdsTnVFT1ZDWmRfalpTVkdlYUkwLUY3ak1aZnhfR2Z5b3dRNzRCU3FFN1FZNXZYTXdjSzBLdjV5WkhFcVhWeDBKR0s3N3hBV3M?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Goldman Sachs offi…

item.title: SHOCK: Goldman jumping into the bitcoin ETF game.. with a filing for a Bitcoin Premium Income ETF - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE80eU9sZjRjR0FYY2lNRm93UHB6Y3dkeUh3eVhmZi15NFFCMkRiZGRJcmxuUDZlaC1mZmloMWVxV0h2UExwYk5zd2tmTUpDaDIxb3BGOGQxVGlFdFpUNTJxUUk0Z1E?oc=5" target="_blank">SHOCK: Goldman jumping into the…

item.title: Senators Eye Draft Deal on Stablecoin Yield Amid Banking Lobby Pushback
item.description: Banks and crypto firms remain divided even as White House data says a yield ban wouldn’t do much for lending.

item.title: Circle 'Exploring' Arc Network Token Launch, Proof-of-Stake Shift: CEO
item.description: Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire reiterated plans for its stablecoin-focused layer-1 blockchain to launch in mainnet “soon.”

item.title: Bitcoin hits $76K after US PPI inflation stays tame: Will BTC hold its gains?
item.description: Bitcoin rallied to levels not seen since early February after US PPI inflation fell well below market expectations.

item.title: High Roller stock more than doubles on prediction markets partnership with Crypto.com
item.description: The announcement comes as an increasing number of companies move into prediction markets, an industry that is estimated to grow to $1 trillion by 2030

item.title: Bitcoin climbs to highest level since Feb. 5 crash that sent price plunging to $60,000
item.description: Optimism over developments in the Middle East sparked a sharp decline in oil prices and rallies across risk markets.

item.title: 🚨NEW: Fed Chair contender Kevin Warsh’s financial disclosure shows early stage investments held through an employment-linked vehicle that spans a wide range of tech, including some crypto infrastructure. Some of the names include Compound (DeFi lend - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9nTXUwMHBBbDVLZ2czb3Z3WEpaSXlKMEdhOGVnN3Y5U05seWY0dFRQZmlYVzFLZzNvcEVZcFB2a0cxbi1pWmU0blZ6YnQ5SExzclRFWjFWTUhPd3lNYW13eURUcDR4QQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨NEW: Fed Chair contender K…

item.title: Bitcoin Shorts Get Rekt as BTC Jumps Above $75K, Hitting 2-Month Price High
item.description: Bitcoin just hit its highest price in over two months, with Ethereum and other top coins rising faster as crypto bears get liquidated.

item.title: JUST IN: $76,000 Bitcoin - x.com
item.description: JUST IN: $76,000 Bitcoin

item.title: Fake Ledger Live app on Apple App Store drained $9.5M from victims: ZachXBT
item.description: A Fake Ledger Live app on Apple’s store is tied to $9.5 million in crypto thefts, as ZachXBT links over 50 victims’ funds to a KuCoin-linked mixer and questions Apple’s liability.

item.title: Why Cantor Fitzgerald thinks Robinhood and Coinbase are the best ways to play the prediction market boom
item.description: Cantor Fitzgerald says Robinhood and Coinbase are best positioned to dominate the prediction market space by leveraging their massive retail scale and existing trading infrastructure.

item.title: Tether launches self-custodial wallet with cloud backup option
item.description: Tether launches tether.wallet, a self-custodial app supporting USDT, XAUT, USAT and Bitcoin with cloud-based key backup features.

item.title: Scroll moves to cut costs after top protocol migrates to Optimism
item.description: The downsizing follows a financial hit after Scroll's top protocol migrated to Optimism, draining nearly $160 million in TVL and $13 million in annualized fees.

item.title: About ~45% of Gen Z and Millennial investors own crypto. Only ~18% of Gen X and Baby Boomer investors do. About $110T in wealth will transfer from older generations to Millennials and Gen Z in the coming decades. We believe this is a structural tailwind fo - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTFBhTXVuSmljdm02RWVKSThoa0EweTFxenA5ZUxOamZYd2MwSlNLRE9zb1BwMjN2VGVVeDI0MFpRYU5nbzhxVEhPRW1WSmlSSjV1d3A4Q1VacGVFMnB0Z3Fr?oc=5" target="_blank">About ~45% of Gen Z and Millennial inv…

item.title: JPMorgan CFO warns stablecoins risk becoming ‘regulatory arbitrage’ play
item.description: During the bank's earnings call on Tuesday, JPMorgan CFO Jeremy Barnum warned that stablecoins could become a tool for regulatory arbitrage unless they are held to the same strict oversight and consumer protection standards as traditional …

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Ethereum (ETH) price rises 5.4%
item.description: Aave (AAVE), up 3.6% from Monday, joined Ethereum as a top performer.

item.title: X product chief Nikita Bier teases a crypto ‘fix’ amid market slump
item.description: X product chief Nikita Bier teases a crypto “fix” product as speculation grows around an X Money rollout this month, a potential Bitcoin revival and Bier’s Solana ties.

item.title: XRP Ledger adds zero-knowledge proofs targeting institutional privacy gap
item.description: The Boundless integration enables private transaction execution on XRPL while maintaining compliance, addressing what the company calls the "transparency tax" that has held back institutional adoption of public blockchains.

item.title: From DeFi to deep space: How SkyMapper and Avalanche are securing the world's telescope records
item.description: SkyMapper has introduced a dedicated Avalanche-based network that records observations from telescopes around the world, turning each data point into a secure, verifiable digital record.

item.title: XRP Ledger taps Boundless for bank-grade privacy on public blockchains
item.description: XRPL is integrating Boundless’ zero-knowledge tech into its base layer, stepping into the race to offer banks confidential onchain transactions without losing regulatory visibility.

item.title: Bitcoin rises to one-month high above $75,000 as analysts eye major breakout
item.description: Several crypto market experts explain what might happen if bitcoin manages to hold $75,000, and if it does not.

item.title: Tether introduces crypto wallet to bring stablecoin and bitcoin payments directly to users
item.description: The stablecoin issuer's crypto wallet lets users send digital dollars, tokenized gold and bitcoin without intermediaries or gas tokens across multiple blockchains.

item.title: Visa and Zodia Custody join Stripe’s new blockchain for machine payments
item.description: The card network configured and managed the validator node entirely in-house, it said, following six months of joint work with Tempo’s engineering team.

item.title: Bitcoin passes halfway point in halving cycle as price gains trail prior cycles
item.description: Slower post-halving gains reflect bitcoin’s shift toward a more mature asset.

item.title: Deutsche Börse Acquires Kraken Stake in $200M Deal
item.description: The Frankfurt exchange operator's investment values Kraken at $13.3 billion, as TradFi giants race to secure footholds in crypto.

item.title: Morning Minute: The SEC Just Gave DeFi The Green Light
item.description: Bitcoin and Ethereum are pumping. DeFi is winning. Saylor is buying big. And Kraken is getting extorted.

item.title: Deutsche Börse invests $200 million in Kraken parent Payward
item.description: Deutsche Börse said it will invest $200 million in Kraken’s parent company for a fully diluted stake of 1.5%, subject to regulatory approval.

item.title: Bitcoin, ether in Goldilocks rally while smaller coins take a back seat
item.description: What you need to know for April 14, 2026

item.title: OneCoin victims get a $40 million lifeline more than a decade after the scam began
item.description: The Department of Justice said it has $40 million in seized assets for victim compensation and it will continue working to seize further criminal proceeds for the defrauded investors

item.title: A fake Ledger app on the Apple App Store drained $9.5 million in crypto
item.description: A malicious Ledger Live clone slipped onto Apple’s App Store, draining millions from dozens of victims across multiple blockchains in a week-long phishing campaign.

item.title: Bitcoin Nears $75K As Risk-on Sentiment, Geopolitical Landscape Improves
item.description: Bitcoin’s push towards $75K comes amid declining bearish options flow and spot buying, with analysts leaning slightly bullish.

item.title: Nauru taps Bitcoiner Dadvan Yousuf for trade role in digital asset push
item.description: Nauru moves from building rules to promoting its digital asset framework as it looks to attract companies and cross-border partnerships.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs clock $291M outflows as BTC blasts past $74K
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $291 million in outflows on Monday as BTC climbed above $74,000, marking the biggest day of redemptions since March 27, led by FBTC.

item.title: DOJ Opens $40M Compensation Process for OneCoin Crypto Fraud Victims
item.description: Victims of the $4 billion OneCoin scam can petition for the opportunity to recover funds from over $40 million in forfeited assets.

item.title: Web3 hacks cost $482M in Q1 as phishing drove majority of losses: Hacken
item.description: Hacken’s Q1 2026 report finds $482 million lost across 44 incidents, with phishing, legacy code bugs and key compromises driving losses as regulators tighten security demands.

item.title: UK Liberal Democrats call for Farage probe in $2.7M Stack BTC promotion
item.description: UK Liberal Democrats called on the FCA to examine Nigel Farage’s promotion of Stack BTC as scrutiny grows over crypto conflicts and political donations.

item.title: US Justice Department opens compensation for victims of $4B OneCoin crypto fraud
item.description: OneCoin was launched by Ruja Ignatova and Karl Sebastian Greenwood in Bulgaria. Ignatova has been missing since 2017, and Greenwood was sentenced to 20 years in prison.

item.title: RNS Announcement: Bitcoin Purchase The Smarter Web Company announces the purchase of additional Bitcoin as part of "The 10 Year Plan" which includes an ongoing treasury policy of acquiring Bitcoin. Please read the RNS on our website (link in comme - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9rdlNORUZ4cUEteDFfeXFGMEd3a3NjOF9BcjRRQTBLcDN5a1JicHdObjJRNnMzeTdNMFNiMGZLdlBiMmJRV1NUcldmMk50WVA1N2ZDandab2w3eGd5cERkVmpuVQ?oc=5" target="_blank">RNS Announcement: Bitcoin Purcha…
